logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-880] The II Violation in module 'fft_fast_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_21_4' (loop 'VITIS_LOOP_21_4'): Unable to enforce a carried dependence constraint (II = 5, distance = 1, offset = 1) between 'store' operation ('x_M_imag_addr_write_ln30', fft_project_wlo/fft.cpp:30) of variable '__r._M_imag.V' on array 'x_M_imag' and 'load' operation ('x_M_imag_load', fft_project_wlo/fft.cpp:24) on array 'x_M_imag'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-880 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-880.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_17_2' (fft_project_wlo/fft.cpp:16:9) in function 'fft_fast' the outer loop is not a perfect loop. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_20_3' (fft_project_wlo/fft.cpp:21:39) in function 'fft_fast' the outer loop is not a perfect loop because either the parent loop or the sub loop has no computeable trip count. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html
WARNING: [SYNCHK 200-23] C:/Xilinx/Vitis_HLS/2022.1/common/technology/autopilot\ap_fixed_base.h:1148: variable-indexed range selection may cause suboptimal QoR.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'fft_1024_top_fpext_32ns_64_2_no_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues. create_ip: Time (s): cpu = 00:00:06 ; elapsed = 00:00:06 . Memory (MB): peak = 1618.789 ; gain = 0.000

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'fft_1024_top_fmul_32ns_32ns_32_4_max_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues. create_ip: Time (s): cpu = 00:00:07 ; elapsed = 00:00:07 . Memory (MB): peak = 1618.789 ; gain = 0.000
